title: phlox variabilis subsp. latisepala
intro: Phlox variabilis subsp. latisepala, also known as Phlox latisepala, is a plant species in the Phlox genus. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever, ease pain, and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of Phlox latisepala include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat various health issues, such as skin conditions and respiratory problems.
